_publications._publicationTitle: Primary osteopathy of vertebrae in a neurofibromatosis type 1 murine model.

_contextSnippet: reduced Alizarin staining was observed in Nf1+/−, Nf1, as well as in flox/flox;Col2.3Cre+ Nf1 cultures in a gene dosage dependent fashion...A significant reduction in the number of mineralized bone nodules
details: Reduced Alizarin staining and significant reduction in mineralized bone nodules in osteoblast cultures in gene dosage dependent fashion
